_comment: Preferred BLF configuration going forward. agg_method=shrink-std-loo subsumes both paper regimes: on benchmarks with low trial variance (e.g. FB with crowd anchor) the LOO grid selects (f=1, c=0) → α≡1 → logit-mean; on noisier benchmarks (e.g. AIBQ2) it selects f<1, c>0 → genuine per-question shrinkage. See paper §C.9. Predict-time aggregation falls back to logit-mean (LOO needs labels); the canonical score comes from forecasts_aggregated[shrink-std-loo:5] computed post-hoc by aggregate.py. Frozen paper-time configs in configs/paper_aibq2.json and configs/paper_fb.json.
name: pro-high-brave-c1-p1-t1
